Wooden Products Factory in China – Facto.text: Our factory operates dedicated production areas for cutting, assembly, sanding, finishing, and packaging. Each production step is handled by experienced workers to ensure stable output and consistent quality.

Our standard OEM production process incl.text: Inquiry & requirement review Sample development & approval Material selection & preparation Mass production Quality inspection Packing & export shipping

Materials & Semi-Finished Products.text: We work with a range of materials including paulownia wood, pine wood, acacia wood, bamboo , and engineered wood options. Semi-finished products are inspected before entering the next production stage to ensure structural accuracy and material consistency. Learn more about our custom wooden products here.

Quality Control.text: As a wooden products factory in China,Quality control is integrated throughout our production process, from material inspection to final packaging. Each order is checked for dimensions, surface finishing, structure stability, and packaging integrity to meet export standards required by international markets. Our production follows international export standards commonly required by overseas markets. We operate our own wooden box factory in China, supporting OEM and private label projects for global buyers.

Export Packaging & Shipping.text: We provide export-ready packaging solutions based on customer requirements, including inner protection, carton packing, and palletization when needed. Our team supports international shipping coordination for markets such as North America, Europe, the UK, and Australia. Explore our OEM wooden product categories.

Experienced OEM & Private Label Manufact.text: We are a wooden products factory in China with practical experience in OEM and private label manufacturing for brands, importers, wholesalers, and distributors. From product development to export packaging, we support projects with a clear and efficient production process.

Wide Product Range for Different Markets.text: Our factory produces a broad range of wooden homeware, storage products, desk organizers, gift boxes, and retail packaging solutions. This allows us to support different product categories, market styles, and price levels in one supply system.

Flexible Customization Options.text: We support custom size, structure, color, logo, insert, and packaging requirements based on your product and brand positioning. Whether you need a simple wholesale model or a more premium private label solution, we can develop the right option for your market.

Material & Finish Choices.text: We work with different wood materials and engineered wood options to match different budgets and product needs. Surface finishing, color matching, logo methods, and hardware details can also be adjusted according to your project requirements.

Quality Control Throughout Production.text: Quality control is integrated into each production stage, from material inspection and semi-finished product checking to final assembly and packing inspection. We focus on structure, finish, dimensions, and packaging quality to support stable export orders.

Export Packaging Support.text: We provide export-ready packaging solutions based on product type and shipping method. Inner protection, carton packing, labeling, and palletization can be arranged according to customer requirements to help reduce transit risk.

Efficient Sampling & Order Follow-Up.text: Our team supports sample development, order follow-up, and production communication with a practical B2B workflow. We aim to make the sampling and ordering process clearer, faster, and easier for overseas buyers.

Long-Term Supply for Wholesale Projects.text: We focus on building stable cooperation with wholesale buyers and brand customers. With consistent production management and clear communication, we support repeat orders and long-term OEM business for international markets.

Frequently Asked Questions.text: Find answers to common questions here. Q1: What kind of products do you manufacture? We specialize in designing and manufacturing a wide range of high-quality wooden organizers and premium packaging solutions. Our core product lines include: Wooden Desk & Office Organizers (e.g., pen holders, monitor stands, desk trays) Wooden Beauty & Cosmetic Organizers (e.g., jewelry boxes, cosmetic brush holders, vanity trays) Kitchen & Dining Wooden Storage (e.g., knife blocks, utensil caddies, spice boxes) Premium Gift & Brand Packaging Boxes (e.g., watch boxes, wine boxes, ring boxes, gift set packaging) Fitness & Wellness Wooden Products (e.g., yoga accessory organizers, gear storage) We are experts in working with materials like Acacia Wood, Pine Wood, Rubber Wood, Walnut, and Bamboo . Are you a factory or a trading company? We are a manufacturing factory with our own production facilities . We have full control over the entire process from wood sourcing, CNC machining, sanding, assembly, to finishing and quality control. You are welcome to visit our factory. What are your main services? (OEM/ODM/OBM) Our primary service is OEM (Original Equipment Manufacturing) and ODM (Original Design Manufacturing) . OEM: We can expertly produce according to your provided designs, samples, or technical drawings. ODM: You can share your concept or target market, and our design team can develop unique products for you. We can provide custom design, material selection, and prototyping services. We do not focus on our own branded (OBM) sales in your market, ensuring we are your dedicated manufacturing partner without competition. What is your MOQ (Minimum Order Quantity)? Our standard MOQ is 3 00 pieces per item, per design . However, we are flexible and can discuss lower MOQs for initial sample orders or simpler products. For larger projects, we offer more competitive pricing. Can I put my own logo or brand on the products? Absolutely. Custom branding is our specialty. We offer various logo application methods including laser engraving, hot stamping, silk screening, and branded labels . We will work with you to choose the best technique for your design and material. Can I customize the product's size, material, color, and interior? Yes, customization is at the heart of our service. You can customize: Dimensions & Size Wood Type & Finish (stain, paint, natural oil) Interior Fabric & Layout (velvet, felt, foam inserts, compartments) Hardware (color of clasps, hinges) Packaging (individual poly bags, carton boxes, retail-ready packaging) We will provide a detailed quotation based on your specific requirements. What is your sample policy? We encourage sample orders to verify quality before bulk production. Sample Lead Time: 7-15 days after confirmation. Sample Cost: You pay the sample cost and shipping. This cost can often be deducted from your first bulk order. Custom Samples: For custom designs, we provide 3D renderings for approval before physical sampling. What is your typical production lead time? For standard orders, our lead time is 30-45 days after sample confirmation and deposit payment . Lead times may vary based on order quantity, complexity, and production schedule. We always provide a clear timeline upfront. How do you ensure product quality? Quality is embedded in our process: Incoming QC: Strict inspection of raw materials. In-Process QC: Checks at each production stage (cutting, sanding, assembly). Pre-Shipment QC: Final 100% inspection against approved samples and specifications before packing. We can provide QC reports and accommodate third-party inspections if required. What are your payment terms? Our standard payment terms are: 30% deposit to commence production. 70% balance before shipment, after approval of pre-shipment photos. For long-term partners, we can discuss more flexible terms like T/T 30% deposit, 70% against BL copy. Where do you ship to, and what are the shipping terms? We have extensive experience shipping globally via sea (FOB, CIF/CNF) and air (EXW, DAP). We work with reliable freight forwarders and will recommend the most cost-effective and efficient shipping solution based on your destination and needs. How can I start a project with you? Simply contact us with: Your product concept, sketches, or reference images. Your target specifications (material, size, quantity, budget). Your intended market and timeline. We will respond within 24 hours with a professional consultation and a clear path forward.

Have more questions?.text: If you have additional questions that are not covered in our FAQ, feel free to reach out. We're here to help and provide any information you may need. Contact Us
